name: Dapple
description: Big watercolor washes layered wet-on-wet — translucent discs drift and overlap into new pools of color with every redraw.

code.style: --wash1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --wash2: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --w1: @rand(60%, 130%); --w2: @rand(40%, 100%); --wx1: @rand(-30%, 50%); --wy1: @rand(-30%, 50%); --wx2: @rand(-20%, 60%); --wy2: @rand(-20%, 60%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: var(--w1); left: var(--wx1); top: var(--wy1); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--wash1); opacity: 0.3; transition: ease 800ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: var(--w2); left: var(--wx2); top: var(--wy2); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--wash2); opacity: 0.3; transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
